title: ColdRelay vs ScaledMail — Cold Email Infrastructure Comparison
description: Comparing ColdRelay and ScaledMail for cold email infrastructure and outreach. See pricing, infrastructure approach, features, and deliverability side-by-side.

overview.coldrelay: ColdRelay provides dedicated cold email infrastructure — Microsoft 365 mailboxes on isolated Azure tenants with dedicated IPs. Pricing is per-mailbox: $1 (1-199), $0.85 (200-999), $0.70 (1K-4,999), $0.55 (5K+). Features include 100-150 mailboxes per domain, automated DNS, no warmup wait, and a 99% inbox guarantee. Setup takes 2-4 hours with a minimum of 50 mailboxes.
overview.competitor: ScaledMail positions itself as both a cold email infrastructure and outreach automation platform. It combines mailbox provisioning with campaign management features. Plans are tiered by outreach volume: Solopreneur at $79/month (contact ~2,000 prospects/month), Business at $119/month (~10,000 prospects), and Enterprise at $249/month (~30,000 prospects). ScaledMail offers automated inbox creation, domain purchasing, CSV export of ready-to-use accounts, and claims 5x cheaper pricing with 50x faster setup compared to traditional methods.

featureComparison.coldrelay: Per-mailbox: $1-$0.55/mailbox/month — pay for exactly the infrastructure you need
featureComparison.competitor: Tiered plans: $79-$249/month based on outreach volume, not mailbox count

featureComparison.coldrelay: Fully isolated Azure tenants with dedicated IPs — your reputation is yours alone
featureComparison.competitor: Infrastructure details less transparent — focus is on the outreach platform rather than infrastructure specifics

featureComparison.coldrelay: 100-150 mailboxes per domain with automated setup
featureComparison.competitor: Create 50 to 1,000 mailboxes in 60 seconds with instant CSV export

featureComparison.coldrelay: Infrastructure only — pairs with Instantly, Smartlead, etc. for campaign management
featureComparison.competitor: Built-in outreach platform with campaign management features

featureComparison.coldrelay: 99% inbox placement guarantee with money-back promise
featureComparison.competitor: 'Get more replies or you don't pay' guarantee
Mailboxes created in 60 seconds (provisioning), but domain and DNS setup time varies

featureComparison.coldrelay: No warmup required — send from day 1
featureComparison.competitor: Warmup approach not detailed — platform focuses on inbox creation speed

featureComparison.coldrelay: Start with 50 mailboxes, scale to 5,000+ with volume pricing
featureComparison.competitor: Locked into plan tiers — need to upgrade plans as volume grows

featureComparison.coldrelay: Bring your own domains or purchase through ColdRelay
featureComparison.competitor: Buy or add domains directly inside the platform

featureComparison.coldrelay: No free trial — but 99% guarantee provides risk coverage
Best-of-breed infrastructure — pairs with your preferred sending platform
featureComparison.competitor: All-in-one platform combining infrastructure with outreach features

sections.coldrelayWins: ColdRelay's per-mailbox pricing gives you precise cost control — you pay for infrastructure, not outreach volume tiers. The dedicated, isolated Azure tenants with dedicated IPs provide a level of infrastructure transparency and quality that ScaledMail doesn't detail. ColdRelay's 99% inbox placement guarantee is specific and measurable, backed by a money-back promise. For teams that already use a sending platform (Instantly, Smartlead, etc.), ColdRelay's infrastructure-only approach means you're not paying for campaign features you won't use. At scale, ColdRelay's volume pricing ($0.55/mailbox at 5K+) can be significantly cheaper than ScaledMail's tier-based model.
sections.competitorWins: ScaledMail's biggest advantage is the all-in-one approach. If you want mailbox provisioning and campaign management in a single platform, ScaledMail removes the need to integrate separate tools. The 7-day free trial lets you test before committing — something ColdRelay doesn't offer. For solopreneurs and small teams just getting started with cold email, ScaledMail's $79/month plan includes everything you need to start reaching prospects. The instant 60-second mailbox creation is genuinely fast for small-batch operations.
sections.whoShouldChooseColdRelay: Choose ColdRelay if you want dedicated, isolated infrastructure with transparent per-mailbox pricing and you already have (or plan to use) a separate sending platform. ColdRelay is ideal for agencies and larger operations that need infrastructure they can trust at scale — with clear isolation guarantees and volume pricing that gets cheaper as you grow.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Choose ScaledMail if you want an all-in-one platform that handles both infrastructure and campaign management. It's especially appealing for solopreneurs and small teams who prefer a single tool over integrating multiple services. The free trial makes it low-risk to evaluate.
sections.verdict: ColdRelay and ScaledMail take different approaches: ColdRelay is pure infrastructure with guaranteed isolation and per-mailbox pricing, while ScaledMail is an all-in-one platform bundling infrastructure with outreach tools. For serious cold email operations that need infrastructure transparency and scale, ColdRelay is the stronger choice. For individuals wanting a simple, all-in-one starting point, ScaledMail's bundled approach has appeal.

faqs.question: Is ScaledMail cheaper than ColdRelay?
faqs.answer: It depends on volume. ScaledMail's $79/month Solopreneur plan may include enough for small operations. But as you scale, ColdRelay's per-mailbox pricing ($0.70 at 1K+ mailboxes) gives more granular cost control and potentially lower costs at higher volumes.

faqs.question: Do I need a separate sending tool with ColdRelay?
faqs.answer: Yes. ColdRelay provides email infrastructure (mailboxes, domains, DNS). You'll pair it with a sending platform like Instantly or Smartlead for campaign management. ScaledMail bundles some outreach features into its plans.

faqs.question: Does ScaledMail offer dedicated IPs?
faqs.answer: ScaledMail doesn't prominently detail its infrastructure isolation approach. ColdRelay explicitly provides dedicated IPs and isolated Azure tenants for every deployment.

faqs.question: Can I try ColdRelay before buying?
faqs.answer: ColdRelay doesn't offer a free trial, but the 99% inbox placement guarantee with a money-back promise means you're protected if the infrastructure doesn't perform. ScaledMail offers a 7-day free trial.

faqs.question: Which is better for an agency managing multiple clients?
faqs.answer: ColdRelay's per-mailbox volume pricing and infrastructure isolation make it well-suited for agencies managing many clients. Each client can have isolated infrastructure. ScaledMail's plan-based pricing may require multiple subscriptions for separate client management.
